build.beforeDevCommand: bun run stage-engine && bun run stage-uv-sidecar && bun run dev
build.beforeBuildCommand: bun run stage-engine && bun run stage-uv-sidecar && bun run build

security.csp: default-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: asset: https://asset.localhost; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost
